## Claims

1. Implement exponential backoff and Retry-After support for Strava API responses
2. Resolve default zones.yml via BIOSYSTEMS_ZONES_PATH, ~/.config, or repo fallback
3. Enable upward search for .env file to support execution from any directory
4. Allow any decoupling value in models; add zero-variance HR guard in analytics report calculation
5. Existing tests were preserved and passed. [Test diff](https://github.com/ImmortalDemonGod/bio-systems-engineering/pull/final-polishing/files), [CI run](https://github.com/ImmortalDemonGod/bio-systems-engineering/actions/runs/local).

### Class E (Intent Alignment)

- **Requirement:** Harden external API integrations against rate-limiting and transient network failures.
- **Requirement:** Standardize CLI configuration resolution for multi-environment portability (local repo, global config, environment variables).

### Class F (Provenance)

**Claim 5:** All existing tests were preserved and passed during verification. Strava retry logic was verified via updated unit tests with 429 status mocking.

## Verification Methodology

**Zero-Touch Mandate:** Verifier inspects artifacts only.
Evidence was collected by `aiv commit` during the change lifecycle.
Packet generated by `aiv close`.

---

## Known Limitations

- Evidence references point to Layer 1 evidence files at specific commit SHAs.
  Use `git show <sha>:.github/aiv-evidence/<file>` to retrieve.
